'''''End Run''''' was a [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|''Xiytiar''-class heavy transport]] operated by the [[Loose Cannon pirates]].

During a skirmish with the [[Azzameen family]], ''End Run'' was used to transport the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] lure. While pumping the cargo from ''End Run'' to the ''[[Vasudra]]''{{'s}} storage tanks, the pirate gang sprang their trap. Unfortunately for the gang, the well-armed Azzameens could not be subdued, and actually sent the pirate ships into retreat if not being destroyed. Only ''End Run'' remained, still connected to the ''Vasudra'' and unable to hyperspace out.

Despite [[Emon Azzameen|Emon's]] wish to "space" them, [[Tomaas Azzameen/Legends|Tomaas Azzameen]] agreed to spare the crew, so long as they gave the bacta to the Azzameens free of charge.
